description: Style NoteThese delectable pair of Terrace shoes from adidas brings a sporty twist to casual footwear. Style this with slim Fit denims and a neutral shaded tee or a tonal monochrome one for maximum effect.Product DetailsOlive green round toed casual shoe with zig-zag stitch detailingCentral lace-ups and a padded tonguePadded inner and soft footbedEVA midsoleTPU outsole with nubs  all overMaterial and careCoated leatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
